title: EHA Parkview ElderCare (Perling) 新山温馨疗养院 #1 Nursing Home Johor Bahru
address: 2 & 4, Jalan Sutera Merah 3, Taman Sutera, 81200 Johor Bahru, Johor Darul Ta'zim, Malaysia

reviews.text: 这里环境很好，还有专业的护士洗伤口，在这段疗养期间，我得到很好的照顾，谢谢
reviews.textTranslated: The environment here is very nice, and there are professional nurses to clean my wounds. I received excellent care during my recovery period. Thank you.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
非常感谢您的肯定与分享。很高兴知道您在疗养期间感到舒适，并且对我们的护理服务感到满意。
我们团队一直致力于提供专业及细心的护理服务，包括伤口护理，确保每位长者和住户都能得到最好的照顾。祝您身体健康，早日完全康复。感谢您的信任与支持。

reviews.text: The staff here are extremely friendly, helpful and caring. They took great care of my family member and did a lot to accommodate. My family is very thankful and will recommend!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We are honoured to have had the opportunity to care for your family member and are delighted to know that our team was able to support and accommodate your family’s needs.
Your appreciation and recommendation truly motivate us to continue delivering quality and compassionate care. We wish your family member all the best in health and recovery.

reviews.text: Very good environment,professional nurse and caregiver
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you very much for your kind and heartfelt feedback.
We are truly glad to know that you felt the warmth and compassion of our care.
Our team is dedicated to caring for every elderly resident with love, respect, and patience, and your recognition means a great deal to all of us.
Thank you for your trust and support. We will continue to provide a safe, warm, and caring environment for our elders

reviews.text:
The service is excellent while my dad staying at this center.
Caring and supportive staffs.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you very much for your kind and heartfelt feedback.
We’re happy to know you find EHA Eldercare a good and trustworthy place for the elderly.
Your support truly means a lot to us.

reviews.text: Thank you very much for the wonderful care you provided to my mother over the past 13 days. She was truly happy, enjoyed the excellent facilities and delicious food, and was delighted to have made new friends. She’s even a little reluctant to go home! We sincerely appreciate everything you’ve done for her.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for your lovely feedback and for trusting us with your mother’s care. We are delighted to know that she had a pleasant and enjoyable stay, and that she felt comfortable with our facilities, meals, and companionship environment.
Your appreciation means a great deal to our team and encourages us to continue providing quality and compassionate care. We wish all family members are the very best in health and wellbeing

reviews.textTranslated: This concept is fantastic! 👍✨ It helps many groups in need of care.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 感谢您的认可和用心推荐🥰

reviews.textTranslated: The environment is different from typical nursing homes; it feels twice as warm and welcoming.

reviews.text: 环境舒适干净。有专业的护理人员处理伤口。
reviews.textTranslated: The environment is comfortable and clean. Professional nurses are available to treat wounds.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 感谢您的认可和用心推荐🥰

reviews.text: I am thankful for the care and kindness I received during my stay here. The staff treated me with respect and always made sure I was comfortable.As I prepared to leave, I appreciate everything they have done for me.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your kind words. We're truly glad to hear that you felt cared for and respected during your stay. It was our pleasure to support you, and we wish you all the best as you move forward. Take care, and please don’t hesitate to reach out if you ever need anything in the future.

reviews.text: 我在这里住了几个月，照顾到很好，护士很专业，护工也很有爱心，值得推荐
reviews.textTranslated: I stayed here for a few months and was well taken care of. The nurses were very professional and the caregivers were very caring. I would highly recommend them.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: 感谢您对我们的认可！为您提供尊重与关怀是我们一直以来的目标。您的支持和肯定是我们前进的动力，也让我们更加坚定为每一位家人创造优美环境和贴心服务的使命。欢迎随时和我们分享您的建议或需求，我们会继续努力做得更好！
